title: Classic Star Wars: A Long Time Ago...
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|italics=1}}
{{Otheruses|A Long Time Ago}}
'''''Classic Star Wars: A Long Time Ago...''''', also marketed as '''''Star Wars: A Long Time Ago...''''', is a comic series that is part of the [[Classic Star Wars]] series of comics and re-publishes the original [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'' (1977)]] series.
It is featured in the [[Comics Link]] section of [[Star Wars Insider 61]].

{{Comics-stub}}
